programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: After a massive storm in central Maine, the Cabin Masters return to two former renovations to help out. Multiple trees destroyed cabins and porches around the YMCA camp property while the Chadwick family's screened-in porch was crushed by a tree.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: Mark and the guys travel to Gatlinburg, Tenn., to replace a log home lost in the 2016 wildfires; they bring with them the Beam Cabin, but it's no easy feat to move these massive logs up a narrow mountain pass; designer Karen Tillery works with Mark.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: In Ohio, Mark and the guys attempt to save a giant double pen barn, but high winds turn this complicated job into a treacherous one.

programme.title: Second Chance Stage
programme.desc: A grocer, client specialist, rancher, financial planner and teacher take the stage for their chance to achieve their long-delayed dreams.

programme.title: In With the Old
programme.desc: A Connecticut couple renovates and expands a beloved little cabin in Weston to provide the space to spend more time with friends and family.

programme.title: In With the Old
programme.desc: A designer and her fiancé rescue a run-down 1899 Folk Victorian from demolition, moving it from the busy streets of Austin, Texas to farmland in nearby Georgetown where they restore it into their own little house on the prairie.

programme.title: In With the Old
programme.desc: Mandi and Court Gubler turn an adobe building into their Utah dream home.

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: Chip and Joanna Gaines take a tour with clients Clint and Kelly Harp through the Brook Oaks neighborhood; the Harps look for a house with an urban feel.

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: A couple wants a home in the Viking Hills neighborhood, but current residents seem hesitant to ever leave.

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: The impending arrival of their baby determines the deadline for the renovation of a couple's ranch style house.

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: Touring three homes in Woodway, Texas, to find a move-in ready place in the city's reputable school district.

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: A couple tours three houses in Waco, Texas, and although their wishlist is small, so is their budget.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: A couple living in Seattle searches for a vacation getaway along the sands of Ocean Park, Wash, and waterfront homes in this Pacific coast community aren't cheap, so finding a deal could require some renovations.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: A Dallas couple is looking for a vacation home that's only a short walk to the beaches of Biloxi, Miss.; they are on a budget and willing to put in the work to renovate a house into a place where they can eventually retire.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: A Carolina family finds a deal on their new beach house on Pawleys Island, S.C.; a massive overhaul of the floor plan and expansions on both floors guarantees room for their growing family.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: A beach-loving family from Raleigh, N.C., looks for their own slice of waterfront heaven on the coast; after a lifetime of working hard, they finally get the chance to make their dreams come true.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: Having split their time between Nashville, Tenn., and Destin, Fla., a couple hopes to get their sons out into the sunshine permanently.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: Tired of Denver cold, a family finds a place in Cocoa Beach, Fla., but they want to add a poolside oasis and custom spa.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: First-time homeowners from the Jersey shore are looking to escape the cold and find their piece of paradise in Madeira Beach, Florida. They're hoping to find a home with water views that they can renovate as a place to raise their family.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: Hoping to create memories, a couple from Durham is searching for a Beaufort, NC beach home to share with family and rent out. But with access to fishing, boating, and beautiful beaches driving up prices, their dream depends on finding an affordable fixer.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: Stephanie and Virginia's wish list for a vacation home in Galveston, Texas includes an elevated deck and close proximity to fishing.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: First-time homeowners from the Jersey shore are looking to escape the cold and find their piece of paradise in Madeira Beach, Florida. They're hoping to find a home with water views that they can renovate as a place to raise their family.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: Hoping to create memories, a couple from Durham is searching for a Beaufort, NC beach home to share with family and rent out. But with access to fishing, boating, and beautiful beaches driving up prices, their dream depends on finding an affordable fixer.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: Stephanie and Virginia's wish list for a vacation home in Galveston, Texas includes an elevated deck and close proximity to fishing.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: Tired of Denver cold, a family finds a place in Cocoa Beach, Fla., but they want to add a poolside oasis and custom spa.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: Mark and the guys go the extra mile to save antique logs from a Tennessee home in distress; they meet Larry, who grew up in the log cabin with no running water; in the end, Mark makes him a one-of-a-kind barn-wood memento of his childhood home.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: Mark finds a perfectly preserved bank barn in Pennsylvania; the beams are so nice, he considers keeping this barn for himself; he also visits a bank barn that has been transformed into a high-end home with barn-wood flooring and soapstone counters.

programme.title: Second Chance Stage
programme.desc: Having overcome life-altering setbacks, five talented acts take the stage, including a musical duo, dancer, singer, comedian and opera hopeful.

programme.title: Capturing Home
programme.desc: A family from Lakewood, Calif., wishes to convert their garage and adjoining outdoor living area into a perfect place to play, relax and entertain, while using their English ancestry as inspiration.

programme.title: Capturing Home
programme.desc: A couple needs help to finish decorating their oversized family room on a budget.

programme.title: Capturing Home
programme.desc: The heart of a newlywed couple's unique historic home is the kitchen, but it's dysfunctional and dated, so, it's up to Kate and Amy to transform it into a space that has modern functionality without losing its rustic charm.

programme.title: Capturing Home
programme.desc: Megan and Michelle desperately need help redesigning their outdoor space, so Kate and Amy bring in some midcentury modern design elements to create a beautiful area for entertaining all year round.

programme.title: Capturing Home
programme.desc: A newly single dad of two girls is ready to transform his house from a bachelor pad devoid of any cohesive design into a true family home that reflects not only his tastes, but also his children's.

programme.title: Capturing Home
programme.desc: A newly divorced grandma moves across the country to be closer to her daughter and grandchild; this is her first house of her very own, and she needs Amy and Kate to help her design a French-inspired home to set the stage for her next chapter.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: A family builds thousands of earth blocks while withstanding winter monsoons, freezing temperatures and more to finish their forever home in San Antonio, Texas.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: A couple head to Arkansas with their kids to build a dream mountain getaway; while the views of this location are breathtaking, this build is anything but a breeze; the family has to work together through severe weather to get this job done.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: A family of four builds their dream home overlooking the Atlantic Ocean in Lubec, ME, while pro snowboarder Sean Busby and his wife build their off-grid home with stunning views of Glacier National Park.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: Needing to get out of the city, a Las Vegas couple and their son head to southern Utah to build a modern A-frame; but with strong winds, winter storms and a challenging terrain, they must work together to build their dream getaway.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael take on a half-finished Victorian mansion in the Historic District that was too good to pass up.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley turn a 1904 single-story bungalow into an adorable home with two bedrooms, two bathrooms, and garage space; a built-in banquette, nostalgic cabinet casings, and an accent wall highlight the interior design.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley remodel a property with problematic additions into a cohesive and spacious home, converting awkward spaces into a flowing floor plan with custom elements throughout.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston
programme.desc: A 1915 home gets an updated layout while keeping the classic lines of beadboard throughout; the addition of a mudroom cabinet, open kitchen shelving and a workable laundry room are sure-fire ways to bring in potential buyers.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: The Inn
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley start construction on their 1912 inn, focusing on the exterior of the building to get it watertight and restored to its former glory; renovations include new paint, a custom front door and an awning wrapped in copper.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: The Inn
programme.desc: Attention turns to the entrance, lounge and bar area at the inn.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: The Inn
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley start tackling the outside of the inn, creating a relaxing oasis.
